reason: Verify final implementation respects primary stack and repository boundary.
Verify offload descriptor does not imply vendor runtime, DMA, execution, correctness, or performance evidence.
Verify parameter layering remains explicit and non-overlapping.
Verify mem_window/runtime_param roles remain typed tcrv.exec ABI surfaces.
Verify offload selected-plan metadata and descriptor ABI role contract are preserved.
Verify exporter validation and descriptor/bundle metadata requirements.
Verify registry and plugin ownership boundaries remain intact.
Verify no new vendor or target-family branching leaked into generic compiler paths.
Verify planning/export front door still reflects pipeline order.
Verify tests cover positive descriptor ABI metadata and one focused fail-closed path.
